name: desafio-api-carrefour
description: Automacao de testes de API para desafio tecnico

scripts.test:ci: mkdir -p reports && newman run postman/Carrefour-API.postman_collection.json -e postman/Carrefour-API.postman_environment.json --delay-request 150 -r cli,junit,htmlextra --reporter-junit-export reports/newman-results.xml --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-report.html
